channel.title: gru on ExampleSite
channel.description: Recent content in gru on ExampleSite

item.title: RNN, LSTM and GRU
item.description: In this post we introduce the recurrent neural network (RNN) model in natural language processing (NLP), as well as two improvements over it, long short-term memories (LSTM) and gated recurrent units (GRU). Natural languages are non-linear. Flows of words and sentences in texts often do not follow simple and predictable patterns. The probability of a word appearing at position $i$ may depend on some words at very far past, instead of always depending on 2 or 3 words behind it.
